TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mette_Frederiksen, title = Mette_Frederiksen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mette_Frederiksen} }

S.FORM: Mette Frederiksen ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Mette Frederiksen, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1977) mrhuw Denmark ta' misuw hya' ga Mette Frederiksen, aring ryax tay 27 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Mette Frederiksen minkahul sa Aalborg na Denmark. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1977 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun mette-frederiksen.dk

Mette Frederiksen ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Mette Frederiksen, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1977) mrhuw Denmark ta' misuw hya' ga Mette Frederiksen, aring ryax tay 27 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2019 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Mette Frederiksen minkahul sa Aalborg na Denmark. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1977 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun mette-frederiksen.dk
S.PHON: mette *re*eriks~ɕen rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, mette *re*eriks~ɕen, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw *enmark taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa mette *re*eriks~ɕen, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral mette *re*eriks~ɕen minkaħul s~ɕa aalβorɣ na *enmark. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun mette-*re*eriks~ɕen.*k
